# `dnsight mx`

MX resolution and optional PTR/STARTTLS; generate MX lines.

## Options

| Option | Type | Default | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `domains` | text | — | no | One or more domains; omit to use config manifest targets. |
| `--config` | file | — | no | YAML path (overrides global --config for this command). |
| `--check-ptr` / `--no-check-ptr` | bool | — | no | Resolve PTR for MX hostnames. |
| `--check-starttls` / `--no-check-starttls` | bool | — | no | Probe STARTTLS on port 25. |
| `--starttls-timeout-seconds` | integer range | — | no | TCP/SMTP timeout for STARTTLS probe. |

## Subcommands

| Command | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [`generate`](generate/index.md) | Print MX RDATA lines from pref:host rows. |
